biomAid 0.1.0

    • Multivariate Random Regression
    • Multivariate Fixed-Effects Regression
    • Extracting and Padding Field Trial Layouts

    Simulate Multi-Treatment Multi-Environment Plant Breeding Trial Data

    simTrialData.Rd

    Generates a balanced split-plot field trial dataset suitable for fitting ASReml-R mixed models and testing randomRegress().

    Experimental design (per environment):

    • Rectangular layout of nrep * rows_per_strip rows × length(treatments) * cols_per_strip columns.

    • nrep replicate blocks, each occupying rows_per_strip consecutive rows.

    • Within each replicate: one treatment strip per treatment (rows_per_strip × cols_per_strip = nvar sub-plots), with treatments randomised to strips independently in every replicate.

    • Varieties randomised to sub-plots within each strip.

    Genetic simulation uses the same conditional multivariate-normal structure that randomRegress() is designed to recover: $$u_1 \sim \mathcal{N}(0,\,\sigma_1^2)$$ $$u_j \mid u_1 \sim \mathcal{N}(\beta_{j,s}\,u_1,\,\sigma_{r_j}^2) \quad j = 2,\ldots,k$$ where \(\beta_{j,s}\) varies by site to create genuine Treatment × Genotype × Environment interaction. The true \(\beta\) matrix is returned alongside the data for ground-truth comparison with model estimates.

    Usage

    simTrialData(
  nvar = 20L,
  nsite = 10L,
  treatments = c("N0", "N1", "N2"),
  nrep = 3L,
  rows_per_strip = NULL,
  cols_per_strip = NULL,
  site_mean = 4500,
  site_sd = 600,
  treat_effects = NULL,
  sigma_base = 250,
  sigr = NULL,
  beta_min = NULL,
  beta_max = NULL,
  rep_sd = 150,
  row_sd = 80,
  col_sd = 60,
  error_sd = 350,
  sep = "-",
  variety_prefix = "Var",
  site_prefix = "Env",
  seed = NULL,
  outfile = NULL,
  verbose = TRUE
)

    Arguments

    nvar

    Integer. Number of varieties. Should be composite (not prime) for a tidy rectangular sub-plot layout; a warning is issued otherwise. Default 20.

    nsite

    Integer. Number of environments (sites). Default 10.

    treatments

    Character vector of length ≥ 2 giving treatment labels. The first element is the baseline; all others are regressed onto it in randomRegress(). Default c("N0", "N1", "N2").

    nrep

    Integer. Number of complete replicates per environment. Default 3.

    rows_per_strip

    Integer or NULL. Rows allocated to each treatment strip within a replicate block. With cols_per_strip must satisfy rows_per_strip * cols_per_strip == nvar. Auto-calculated to the near-square factor pair when NULL.

    cols_per_strip

    Integer or NULL. Columns per treatment strip. Auto-calculated when NULL (see rows_per_strip).

    site_mean

    Numeric. Grand mean yield across all sites (same units as the simulated trait). Default 4500.

    site_sd

    Numeric. Standard deviation of site mean yields. Default 600.

    treat_effects

    Numeric vector of length length(treatments) giving the fixed treatment main effects, with treat_effects[1] = 0 for identifiability. Auto-spaced from 0 to 0.25 * site_mean when NULL.

    sigma_base

    Numeric. Genetic standard deviation for the baseline treatment BLUP. Default 250.

    sigr

    Numeric vector of length length(treatments) - 1. Conditional (responsiveness) standard deviations for each non-baseline treatment given the baseline. Auto-scaled to sigma_base * 0.4 * seq_len(ntreat - 1) when NULL.

    beta_min

    Numeric vector of length length(treatments) - 1. Lower bound of the uniform distribution from which site-specific regression coefficients are drawn for each non-baseline treatment. Auto-calculated when NULL.

    beta_max

    Numeric vector of length length(treatments) - 1. Upper bound (see beta_min). Auto-calculated when NULL.

    rep_sd

    Numeric. Standard deviation of replicate (block) effects. Default 150.

    row_sd

    Numeric. Standard deviation of row spatial effects. Default 80.

    col_sd

    Numeric. Standard deviation of column spatial effects. Default 60.

    error_sd

    Numeric. Standard deviation of the plot-level residual (within-sub-plot error). Default 350.

    sep

    Character. Separator used when constructing the composite TSite factor (e.g. "N0-Env01" with sep = "-"). Must not appear inside any treatment or site label. Default "-".

    variety_prefix

    Character. Prefix for variety labels. Default "Var".

    site_prefix

    Character. Prefix for site labels. Default "Env".

    seed

    Integer or NULL. Random seed passed to set.seed(). NULL uses the current RNG state. Default NULL.

    outfile

    Character path or NULL. If non-NULL the data frame is written to this CSV path via write.csv(). Default NULL.

    verbose

    Logical. Print a design summary and suggested ASReml-R model call. Default TRUE.

    Value

    A named list:

    data

    Data frame with columns Site, Treatment, TSite, Variety, Rep, Row, Column, yield. Ordered by Site, Row, Column for compatibility with ASReml-R spatial models.

    params

    Named list of true simulation parameters for ground-truth comparison with randomRegress() estimates:

    beta

    nsite × (ntreat-1) matrix of true site-specific regression coefficients.

    sigr

    Vector of true conditional standard deviations.

    treat_effects

    True treatment fixed effects used.

    site_means

    True site mean yields used.

    g_base

    Standardised variety genetic potentials (length nvar).

    g_arr

    nvar × ntreat × nsite array of true genetic values.

    Examples

    if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Reproduce the original 3-treatment, 10-site dataset
out <- simTrialData(seed = 2024, outfile = "plant_trial_data.csv")
head(out$data)
out$params$beta   # compare with randomRegress()$beta

# Two-treatment, 5-site dataset
out2 <- simTrialData(nsite = 5, treatments = c("Dry", "Irr"), seed = 1)

# Four treatments, 12 varieties, 4 reps
out4 <- simTrialData(nvar = 12, nsite = 8,
                     treatments = c("T0","T1","T2","T3"), nrep = 4,
                     seed = 99)
} # }
